name: Magic Hour: The Series
overview: A continuation of the love story of Raina & Rangga. Three months after Dimas's death, Raina & Rangga continued their long distance relationship. Raina feels that Rangga has changed since he returned to America. The reality turned out to be far worse than he imagined when Raina decided to follow Rangga to America.
